no: ZSTweaks Holy number of tweaks, Batman. Adviced to be installed as the first tweak mod. Details are a bit more complicated. ZSTweaks - General Item & Spell Tweaks The components changing the basic weapon qualities tread the same ground as Item Revisions, Forgotten Armaments, and some of SubtleD's Item Tweaks and Made in Heaven Item Pack Overwriting FA with these should keep FA's added crit threat to weapons without problem in some cases. In others you may want to set a given update_nwn_X value t

conflicts.reason: Both modify overlapping spells (Slow Poison, Sunray, Luck, Goodberry, Wondrous Recall, Black Blade of Disaster). Use one or the other for each.
cdtweaks Luke feats overlap with ZSTweaks equivalents. Use one set or the other
conflicts.theirComps: #6050 Dual-Wield Rangers #6040 Weapon Finesse Thieves #6110 Sneak Attack Blackguards

conflicts.reason: Both modify the same items. Choose one version
conflicts.theirComps: #1010 Backstab Immunity Ring #1020 Missile Deflection Gloves

conflicts.reason: TnT Limited stock removes items from stores that ZSTweaks modifies

spells: Conjured wielded magical weapons gain +1 APR
Divination spells and select others ignore magic resistance

sum: Massive tweak collection with 254 individually selectable changes to game rules, items, spells, and mechanics. The largest single tweak mod.

co.n: Install all tweaks in the general tweaks group (except the ones that require a choice)
co.no: Meta-component: installs all general tweaks at once (except subcomponent choices). Convenience shortcut.

co.n: Make conjured wielded magical weapons add 1 extra APR (Flame Blade, Phantom Blade...)
co.no: Adds +1 APR to conjured wielded weapons (Flame Blade, Phantom Blade, Black Blade, Spell Weapon, etc.).

co.n: Make some weapon categories incur in backstab penalties for balance
co.no: ToF/SCS, SubtleD Spells Tweaks, and MiH Spell Pack seem compatible. SubtleD Item Tweaks can do the same

co.n: Make Flails and Morningstars always inflict a small amount of piercing damage
co.no: Note that it gives penalties, but doesn't forbid. Redundant with Item Revisions' component

co.n: Make Spears do a baseline damage of 1d8, not 1d6
co.no: probably fine with FA, as this only seems to add a new effect, not change what's already there

co.n: Make Warhammers do a baseline damage 1d5+1, not 1d4+1 (except hammers outside that range)
co.no: FA and MiH Fixpack already do the same. Probably safe to overwrite. SD's IT give them 1d10.

co.n: Make Wakizashis and Ninja-Tos deal 2d4 instead of 1d8
co.no: FA already brings all hammers to the standard of those "outside that range", that is 1d8. MiH Fixpack fixes hammers so that the stronger ones do 2d4+2 instead of 2d4, the same way weaker hammers do 1d

co.n: Make Wakizashis a piercing/slashing weapon
co.no: FA makes them do 1d6

co.n: Make Light Crossbows get +1/2 more APR
co.no: Light crossbows gain +1/2 APR bonus. Modifies weapon headers.

co.n: Make Katanas deal 2d5 instead of 1d10
co.no: Changes katana damage from 1d10 to 2d5 (same average, less variance).

co.n: Make Bastard Swords deal 1d8+1 by default
co.no: FA retains teh 1d10. Depends on the average damage you prefer.

co.n: Make Two-handed swords deal 1d9+1 by default, and 2d6 where it applies
co.no: FA makes them do 1d10. But I kinda like this +1 safety for minimal damage.

co.n: Make Daggers have general extra features to compensate the low damage
co.no: FA slaps a 2d6 dice to all 2hs across the board. This seems more interesting.

co.n: Make some rogue weapons have the chance of doing more damage if wielded by pure thieves (Finesse)
co.no: yo Imma let ya finish but I heardz you like crits so I put crits so you crit while you crit no seriously if you like backstabbing with daggers you may love this

co.n: Moderate the inexplicably double damage magical throwing daggers do, to not make them the obvious choice all the time
co.no: Tweaks Anthology's Finesse component is straight from 3E (thief uses DEX when wielding small melee weapons), but uses EEeex (so no go for Mac users) ZSTweaks' Finesse gives % proc of extra damage depe

co.n: Make all divination spells and a few spells ignore magic resistance, where it makes sense
co.no: Removes MR check from divination spells and select utility spells. Affects many spell files.

co.n: Make unenchanted bracers, belts and boots grant +1 HP, so they're not just garbage used only for RP purposes
co.no: Unenchanted bracers, belts, and boots grant +1 HP. Makes vendor trash useful for early game.

co.n: Rebalance wands (currently only the Wand of Missiles is affected)
co.no: clashes with Tweaks and Tricks - Cleanup stores as it removes them from stores

co.n: Rebalance some potions
co.no: Rebalances several potion effects and durations.

co.n: Make all potions usable by all classes
co.no: It may overwrite MiH Item Pack's P&P Healing Potions making potion of healing do 2d4+2 (4-10) hp) with straight 12 hp.

co.n: Make Poison-curing spells an instant cast so attempting to cure poison is less likely to be interrupted
co.no: Poison-curing spells become instant cast (casting time 0). Prevents cure interruption.

co.n: Make potions and food items universally incapable of stacking with themselves
co.no: Could SubtleD's Spell Tweaks' "Change Neutralize Poison into 'Remove Afflictions" cause inconsistencies?

Several mods do similar (ie: RR). Choose one and stick with it. Tresset's Allow Stacking Potions will do the inverse. v Make jewelry and other items meant to be sold more valuable Similar to Random Gr

co.n: Install all tweaks in the class/kit tweaks group
co.no: ZSTweaks - Class and Kit-related tweaks

co.n: Make Sun Soul Ray from Sun Soul Monks scale further and do more damage to undead
co.no: Sun Soul Ray: scales further at higher levels, increased undead damage.

co.n: Make Sun Soulbeam do more damage to undead: 12d6 instead of just 3 more damage than baseline
Make Shaman's Etheral Retribution do more damage per round: 6d6 per round instead of 3d8
co.no: irrelevant with AK's monk overhaul, as it changes these two skills for others

co.n: Make Shaman's Writhing Fog slightly more powerful
Make Shaman's Spirit Fire slightly more powerful
Make Shaman's Spiritual Clarity induce more clarity (removes berserk and intoxication too)
Make Shaman's Favored of the Spirits lasts for 24 hours (2 in-game hours), not 1 (5 in-game minutes)
Make War Cry inflict fear with a -2 Saving Throw penalty
co.no: War Cry: fear effect uses -2 saving throw penalty.

co.n: Make Set Spike Trap do piercing damage instead of magic damage
co.no: compatible but bit redundant with Refinements or ToF (adds a Greater WC with same penalty and a party bonus), incompatible with Passive Warrior HLAs

co.n: Make Exploding Trap do slightly more damage: 15d6 as opposed to 10d6
co.no: Exploding Trap: 15d6 damage instead of 10d6.

co.n: Make selected kit HLAS unable to be breached
co.no: these two are redundant with RR's Thief High Level Ability revisions; ToF stomps that with Refinements' versions, so then you may want them. Could they be compatible with Epic Thieving's Epic Trap Set

co.n: Make Quivering Palm slightly more powerful at high levels
co.no: Jtweaks and S&A also do this. No need to repeat similar components, but probably safe

co.n: Make the THAC0 progression of Thieves better and more streamlined, so they improve up to 6, like clerics
co.no: Skip if using AK's monk overhaul, as QP scales by WIS above 16 there

co.n: Make the THAC0 progression of Bards better and more streamlined, so they improve up to 6, like clerics
co.no: Bard THAC0 progression improved to reach 6 (like clerics) instead of stopping earlier.

co.n: Make Poison Weapon improve couple of times more every 4 levels (level 17, and 21)
co.no: there are many mods that do the same as these two (MnG, ToF, TA...), with difference in the details. Pick one method and stick with it.

co.n: Allow Blackguards to perform backstabs as if they had a 2x backstab multiplier
co.no: again, many options: AK, Nostalgia Pack, Tresset's Rebalanced Poison Weapon... Choose one.

co.n: Light proficienciy overhaul
co.no: Also done by TA's Sneak Attack class feat for Blackguards (for EEex, melee and ranged) and Artisan's Kitpack's Blackguard overhaul (x2 backstab at lv11). Avoid installing together

co.n: Make inappropriately aligned creatures in BG2 more correct
co.no: Compatible with TA's Change Grandmastery Bonuses, and All The Things Revised's Worthwhile Proficiency Points: Buff 1st and 4th proficiency point in a weapon ZSTweaks - Creature Tweaks

co.n: Make summoned demons grant XP to the party when they kill something

advisories.reason: Both modify Rod of Terror (RODS05.itm) and Rod of Lordly Might (RODS02.itm). Last installed wins
advisories.myComps: #1587 Rod of Terror / #1190 Rod of Lordly Might
